Package org.attoparser.dom

Class Element

Object
org.attoparser.dom.Element
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, INestableNode, INode
public class Element extends Object implements Serializable

Element node in a DOM tree.

Since:
2.0.0
Author:
Daniel Fernández
